title: sambucus pubens f. leucocarpa
intro: Sambucus pubens f. leucocarpa is a variety of the American elderberry plant, specifically a white-berried form of the elderberry shrub native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sambucus pubens f. leucocarpa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Sambucus pubens f. leucocarpa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made from the berries, flowers, or roots of the plant.
